description: Paired human and judge leaf-level grades for reliability analysis. Target n >= 150 before claiming stable judge agreement.

fields.example_id: Unique grading example identifier, usually paper_id + leaf_id + run_id
fields.human_scores: Object mapping human rater IDs to binary scores
fields.judge_scores: Object mapping judge model IDs to binary scores
fields.metadata: Optional object with run_id, evidence_quote_present, notes, or calibration tags
